title: OPEC Oil Embargo of 1973
subtitle: Arab nations quadruple oil prices overnight, triggering global economic upheaval

ripples.headline: US gasoline prices surge 300% as long lines form at empty gas stations nationwide
Federal speed limit reduced to 55 mph as government implements emergency conservation measures
Auto industry pivots toward fuel-efficient compact cars as American muscle car era ends
US inflation soars to double digits as energy costs cascade through entire economy
Suburban mall construction halts as developers rethink car-dependent retail locations
Solar panel research receives massive federal funding boost as alternative energy gains urgency
Small-town pizza delivery driver's moped breaks down, forcing $18 burrito purchase at only walkable restaurant

symphony_arc.opening: Arab oil producers turn petroleum into a geopolitical weapon
symphony_arc.development: Energy shortages cascade through transportation and manufacturing
symphony_arc.climax: Double-digit inflation grips the American economy
symphony_arc.resolution: One hungry delivery driver faces an overpriced burrito
